name: aletheia-os
description: Repo-native project-state OS for agentic development. Initializes, orients, maintains, validates, and checkpoints repositories using the AletheiaOS .aletheia control plane.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native project-state control plane for AI-assisted work.
interface.defaultPrompt: Initialize or operate this repository with AletheiaOS. Keep durable project state in .aletheia/ and preserve code, tests, and public docs in their normal project locations.
